sources.title: Scaling Laws Overview
sources.snippet: Training loss follows a power law in model size, dataset size, and compute.

sources.title: Chinchilla compute-optimal scaling
sources.snippet: Compute-optimal LLMs need more tokens per parameter than previously believed.

findings.answer: Transformer training loss follows a power law in model size, dataset size, and compute.
evidence: Power law in model size, dataset size, and compute.

findings.answer: Compute-optimal training uses more tokens per parameter than Kaplan-style scaling.
evidence: Compute-optimal LLMs need more tokens per parameter.
